trending_videos.title: Carolina Hurricanes at Philadelphia Flyers
trending_videos.description: The Hurricanes take on the Flyers in Game 3 of the East second round at Xfinity Mobile Arena. Carolina leads 2-0. Frederik Andersen made 34 saves, while Dan Vladar stopped 40 shots in a losing effort. Taylor Hall scored the deciding goal.

trending_videos.title: Resident Evil Requiem - Leon Must Die Forever Free Update Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Leon Must Die Forever is available now as a free update to Resident Evil Requiem!

Unlocked by completing the story, this additional minigame mode challenges you to clear numerous stages as Leon while unlocking exclusive enhancer abilities. The fast-paced action is distinct from the main story mode, and is packed with replay value. Can you make it to the end alive and defeat the boss within the time limit?

Multiple difficulty levels are available, including an extreme high-difficulty mode for only the most confident players. True to the title, you’ll "die forever"...

Resident Evil Requiem is out now on PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, Steam, Epic Games Store and GeForce NOW.

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

trending_videos.title: Tampa Bay Rays at Boston Red Sox
trending_videos.description: The Boston Red Sox host the Tampa Bay Rays at Fenway Park in an American League East matchup. Left-hander Connelly Early starts against right-hander Jesse Scholtens in the opening contest of a four-game series to improve their league standing.

trending_videos.title: Stranger than Heaven - Cast & Story Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
trending_videos.description:
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10017939

FACE DOWN FATE. 
STRANGER THAN HEAVEN is a fifty-year, action-adventure saga of men with nowhere to go and their desperate struggle to find a home. Use extreme violence to survive, and musical talent to thrive as a showman across five cities and eras of modern Japan. Coming this Winter.

Wishlist Now: https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10017939

trending_videos.description: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across America to present news with a clear and direct approach.

trending_videos.title: Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 – Official Reveal Trailer | IGN First
trending_videos.description:
We're excited to announce that our May IGN First "cover story" is on Aliens: Fireteam Elite 2 from Cold Iron and Daybreak Games. You can look forward to several exclusive new reveals on IGN channels spread throughout the month of May, starting with tomorrow's AFE2 trailer premiere and official announcement!

#IGN #Aliens

trending_videos.title: Truist Championship, First Round
trending_videos.description: The first round of the sixth Signature Event on the PGA TOUR takes place at the Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rory McIlroy, the world's second-ranked player, returns as a heavy favorite, having won four times at this venue.

trending_videos.title: LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight – Official Launch Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Legends aren’t born — they're built. LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight arrives May 22, 2026. 

Pre-order now: https://legobatmangame.com/   

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a brand-new open world action adventure video game that invites players to embark on Bruce Wayne’s epic journey to become the hero of Gotham City, inspired by decades of Batman films, television, comic books, and games, and jam-packed with Batman nostalgia, DC lore, and TT Games’ signature brand of fun-filled LEGO humor.   

Gotham City’s latest news, in the palm of your hand:
Instagram: https://go.wbgames.com/LEGOBatmanInstagram 
Facebook:  https://go.wbgames.com/LEGOBatmanFacebook   
TikTok: https://go.wbgames.com/WBGamesTikTok    
X: https://go.wbgames.com/LEGOBatmanX 

Follow The LEGO Group:   
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lego/    
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LEGO/    
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@LEGO    
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lego    

Follow Batman and DC Comic

trending_videos.description: The reunion ends with shattered trust and a showdown that could end it all.

entertainment_and_pop_culture.description: A significant portion of trending videos are related to entertainment and pop culture, including trailers for popular TV shows, movies, and games.
examples: The Boys Season 5 Episode 7 Trailer: President Homelander
Resident Evil Requiem - Leon Must Die Forever Free Update Trailer
Stranger than Heaven - Cast & Story Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight – Official Launch Trailer
entertainment_and_pop_culture.insight: Trailers and updates for popular franchises continue to capture significant viewer interest.
entertainment_and_pop_culture.opportunity: Develop content around popular franchises, including reviews, theories, and behind-the-scenes insights to capitalize on audience interest.

sports.description: Sports content remains a strong category with live game coverage and related commentary.
examples: Tampa Bay Rays at Boston Red Sox
sports.insight: Live sports events and highlights are consistently popular, indicating high engagement levels.
sports.opportunity: Create supplementary content such as analysis, predictions, and post-game discussions to engage sports audiences.

news_and_politics.description: Political commentary and news are also present in trending content.
news_and_politics.insight: Timely political and news commentary can attract a dedicated audience interested in current affairs.
news_and_politics.opportunity: Offer nuanced analysis and diverse viewpoints to capture a wider audience interested in political content.

diversity_of_channels.description: Trending content is produced by a wide range of channels, from entertainment-focused to sports networks.
diversity_of_channels.insight: Channels specializing in niche content related to popular culture and sports are more likely to trend.
diversity_of_channels.opportunity: Develop a specialized content strategy focusing on a specific niche to enhance chances of trending.

single_video_trends.description: Each channel has one video in the trending list.
single_video_trends.insight: A single well-timed and relevant video can propel a channel to trending status.
single_video_trends.opportunity: Focus on quality and topical relevance for each video to maximize the potential to trend, rather than relying on volume.

gaming_and_entertainment.description: High engagement in gaming and entertainment trailers suggests a lucrative market.
gaming_and_entertainment.insight: There is substantial viewer interest in upcoming media releases and updates.
gaming_and_entertainment.opportunity: Partner with or create content related to upcoming game and movie releases, including sneak peeks, interviews, and exclusive content.

sports_content.description: Consistent interest in sports indicates an opportunity for growth.
sports_content.insight: Sports content remains a reliable avenue for viewer engagement.
sports_content.opportunity: Leverage live events and partnerships with sports channels to produce ancillary content that captures the excitement of live sports.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
